basic_details.job_title: HBCHRC Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Field Investigator, Project Coordinator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre
basic_details.short_information: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre (HBCHRC Visakhapatnam) Field Investigator / Project Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website of Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the HBCHRC Visakhapatnam Field Investigator / Project Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Post Graduate Degree, Masters in Public Health, Masters in Epidemiology, Masters in Population Science
qualification.details: Field Investigator: Graduate with Computer course in MS Office software is desirable. Project Coordinator: Graduate in science / Post Graduate Degree. Preference will be given to candidates having Masters in Public Health/ Masters in Epidemiology / Masters in Population Science or Equivalent.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HBCHRC Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Investigator and Project Coordinator posts at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam is scheduled for 20 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: For the Field Investigator position, candidates need to be a Graduate. A computer course in MS Office software is considered desirable for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The Project Coordinator position at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam offers a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 21,100/- to Rs. 50,000/-.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the HBCHRC Visakhapatnam recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Field Investigator position at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre, Visakhapatnam.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Investigator and Project Coordinator posts at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies released by HBCHRC Visakhapatnam?
faq.answer: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital & Research Centre (HBCHRC Visakhapatnam) has released a total of 6 vacancies for the posts of Field Investigator and Project Coordinator.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Field Investigator and Project Coordinator at HBCHRC Visakhapatnam are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the HBCHRC Visakhapatnam office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.
